title: Email notifications: Modernized design for top Confluence emails
description:
Confluence email notifications for Daily Digest, Mentions, Content Updates, and Weekly Recommendations now feature a modernized design. These updates make emails easier to scan, more visually engaging, and consistent with Atlassian’s latest design standards, helping you stay informed and take action faster. Check your inbox for Confluence email notifications, including Daily Digest, Mentions, Content Updates, and Weekly Recommendations.
	Open any of these emails to experience the new design and
